meta.title: Shewanella gelidimarina sp. nov. and Shewanella frigidimarina sp. nov., Novel Antarctic Species with the Ability To Produce Eicosapentaenoic Acid (20:5{omega}3) and Grow Anaerobically by Dissimilatory Fe(III) Reduction
